reviews.comment:
Realmente para destacar la amabilidad de las personas que atienden y la limpieza y orden del lugar. Viajamos desde Buenos Aires y un placer encontrar una estación de servicio que funcione así. Muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
The friendliness of the staff and the cleanliness and order of the place are truly remarkable. We traveled from Buenos Aires and it was a pleasure to find a service station that operates like this. Thank you very much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlemQzLXF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es bello el local, super limpio, no pudimos cargar combustible porque ya no tenían tal ves porque ahí el costo de la nafta super estaba 5.100 Gs mientras que en Paraguay 9.990 Gs.

(Translated by Google)
The place is beautiful, super clean, we couldn't fill up because they didn't have any left, maybe because there the cost of premium gasoline was 5,100 Gs while in Paraguay it was 9,990 Gs.
